requestedAction: Create or connect one dedicated Netlify staging-only site for gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system and deploy from main.
scope: This approval allows AG OS to use Netlify for exactly one staging-only deployment milestone for gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system. The allowed live actions are limited to creating or connecting one dedicated Netlify staging-only site named ag-social-media-management-system-staging, deploying from main at commit d3fcd8c6435433169686c2ec404a5f00c6cc62bd, verifying the staging URL returns HTTP 200, recording the Netlify deployment result, and stopping before production, custom domain, DNS, paid features, secrets, social account connection, social credentials, posting, scheduling, n8n activation, real client data, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution changes.
revocationPath: Expired approval lock blocked or would block the mandatory boot sequence. Original expiration: 2026-07-05T23:17:35.591Z. This approval is no longer valid for gated actions. Historical proof remains preserved; any future action requires a new scoped owner approval lock.

evidence.reference: Current thread owner approval granted for approval-20260704-social-media-netlify-staging.
npm.cmd run validate, npm.cmd run boot:check, and node --test tests/*.test.mjs passed immediately before execution.

approvalText: Owner approval granted for approval-20260704-social-media-netlify-staging. AG OS may create or connect one dedicated Netlify staging-only site named ag-social-media-management-system-staging for gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system and deploy staging from main at d3fcd8c6435433169686c2ec404a5f00c6cc62bd. Verify staging URL HTTP 200 and record the result. No production AG Digitalz/customer domain, DNS change, custom domain, paid Netlify features, secrets, social account connection, credentials, posting, scheduling, analytics API, n8n activation, real client data, target repo edits, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution change is approved.
